arts.ttl: Hecking's Bochum contract to be extended – on one condition
arts.sum: Dieter Hecking's contract as VfL Bochum coach will be extended by a further two years if the club avoid relegation from the Bundesliga.

arts.ttl: Bochum close to securing Jörg Schmadtke’s administrative services
arts.sum: Germany's main sporting tabloid is treating Jörg Schmadtke's appointment as a VfL Bochum boss to be a mere formality.

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool identify £32m Premier League defender as alternative to Jeremie Frimpong
arts.sum: Liverpool have identified a Newcastle United defender as a potential alternative to Jeremie Frimpong as they prepare for life without Trent Alexander-Arnold. Talks over a...

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen's flying Dutchman, a Moroccan speedster and Tottenham's out-of-favour full-back... Liverpool's options to replace Trent Alexander-Arnold as he nears Real Madrid move
arts.sum: Real Madrid have been keen on Alexander-Arnold as a long-term replacement for Dani Carvajal, with reports claiming Los Blancos have sent him a proposal.
